# VergeSense

> Continuous workplace occupancy intelligence captured passively from existing ceiling fixtures.

## Anti-hype marker
Inverts the workplace-tech default that better intelligence requires more employee engagement.

## FROM → TO
- **From:** Tenant surveys + badge data + manual occupancy counts
- **To:** Continuous ambient sensing
